items.title:
[负面] [h1] Half decent dungeon explore cards game [/h1]
...
items.summary:
[h1] Half decent dungeon explore cards game [/h1]
[u][b]basic system[/b][/u]
This game have two mode, normal battle or dungeon mode, there no auto battle mode, the character cg is in highest quality but the rest things in game are terrible to watch it.

cards base role play game, often the card show way is really chaos, you could draft all defense or heal card when you need attack card and got full hand attack card when your team low hp.

all dialog is basic same, there no different path exist in this game even if you choice all other dialog in game ever thing just repeat.

[u][b]combat system[/b][/u]
the whole team sharing the same hp bar, it's really weird, the difficult of this game are variety, you could pass all monster easy then be one shot of the dungeon boss.

personal didn't like the idea of all team sharing the same hp bar idea, it's play out really wired and lose the main idea of team coop, you can't protect the healer cause you would die together as team.

they force you to use the caster skill, but you may want to save to on later turn.

[u][b]detail things[/b][/u]
The whole game force you to go in dungeon over and over again, which is repetitive and got board rapidly fast, the pace of this game pace had huge problem.

This game is current rate only lower rate for maximum, from score personal only rate 5, need more work before it's reach to be a decent mobile game.

below are my guide.
https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3442085498

items.title: [正面] Very Fun game with a very friendly f2p gacha, grea...
items.summary: Very Fun game with a very friendly f2p gacha, great for card strategists like slay the spire but with anime style very fun and very engaging 10/10

items.title: [正面] Это гибрид ML BB, Геншин и хонкай, но карточный. P...
items.summary:
Это гибрид ML BB, Геншин и хонкай, но карточный. Pvp очень понравилось, прям отдельная игра. Жаль что в первую очередь это MOBA. Персонажи падают легко, зато для полной прокачки нужно 15 повторок ;) 
Перевод пока что даёт проржаться, но если его не было бы, я бы навряд ли играл.
В целом уверенный середнячок.
